title: turania sogdiana
intro: Turania sogdiana is a plant species native to Central Asia, commonly known as Sogdian Turania or Turania. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Turania sogdiana include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as a diuretic and expectorant. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures for various medicinal purposes.
